scenarios.title: waits for landscape image to load and verifies its source attribute
scenarios.userAction: Navigate to the loading-images demo page and wait for the landscape image element to appear in the DOM with a src attribute containing 'landscape'.
expectedAssertions: After page load: element #landscape is present in the DOM
After page load: #landscape src attribute contains the substring 'landscape' (case-insensitive)

locatorTable.notes: Element id and page context (loading-images educational demo, bonigarcia author) strongly suggest . Fallback if alt text absent or differs: page.locator('#landscape') at HIGH confidence (mechanical By.id -> CSS-id per KB hallucination rule 1). Reviewer must resolve Q3 before Stage 2 runs.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q3 unresolved — alt text inferred from element id and bonigarcia demo conventions; not confirmed by DOM inspection
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Inspect https://bonigarcia.dev/selenium-webdriver-java/loading-images.html source. If confirmed, keep getByAltText. If alt is absent or differs, switch to page.locator('#landscape') and add inline WHY-comment explaining why role/label/altText hierarchy is unavailable.
